tools.title: DeepEcoHAB RFID DAQ
tools.description: Start the new RFID DAQ + FLIR camera acquisition GUI.

tools.title: Old RFID DAQ + new firmware
tools.description: Start the legacy old-board RFID acquisition GUI (8 RFID antennas, no camera/TTL/env control). Requires new board firmware!

tools.title: DeepEcoHAB / EcoHAB RFID dataframe reformatter
tools.description: Convert old/new board outputs into files readable by new analysis Dashboard.

tools.title: Hardware Trigger
tools.description: Open the standalone TTL hardware-trigger scheduler / pulse generator to trigger external devices.
